# StatCards

> Generate beautiful GitHub stats cards — enter a username, pick a theme, export as PNG.

## What it does
StatCards fetches any public GitHub profile using the GitHub REST API and renders a
polished stats card with avatar, bio, stars, repos, forks, PRs, followers, and a
language breakdown bar. The card can be exported as a high-resolution PNG or copied
directly to the clipboard — with zero backend, no API key, and no uploads.

## Live app
https://statcards.vercel.app/

## Source code
https://github.com/terminalchai/statcards

## Tech stack
- React 19 + Vite 7
- Tailwind CSS v4
- html-to-image (PNG/clipboard export)
- GitHub REST API (public endpoints, no auth)
- Playwright (42 automated tests across 3 viewports)
- Space Grotesk font

## Themes
Midnight, Dracula, GitHub Dark, Tokyo Night, Nord, Solarized

## Author
Terminal Chai — https://github.com/terminalchai
